claim_bullets.bullet_text: JavaScript Allongé explains terms such as functions, scopes, and closures so readers can grasp their meaning (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.1-13).
It may provide recipes that use functions to write software that is simpler, cleaner, and less complicated than object‑centric or code‑centric approaches (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.1-13).
JavaScript Allongé may begin at the basics—values and expressions—and build to topics like types, identity, functions, closures, scopes, collections, and iterators (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.1-13).

source_record_text: JavaScript Allongé, the 'Six' Edition, introduces programming with functions and the evolution to ECMAScript 2015.
